string.text: Incoming Transmission
Select Response
Communications Centre
Task received. Check your PDA for details.
Unable to process task request at this time.
Received $amount RU via electronic transfer.
$amount RU deducted from account.
Your reputation in the Zone has improved.
Your reputation in the Zone has suffered.
$faction relations improved by $amount points.
$faction relations decreased by $amount points.
Received: $what
Stash coordinates received. Check your map.
Insufficient funds for this transaction.
WARNING: Hostile contacts detected in your area.
ALERT: Hostile forces approaching your position.
Friendly contacts inbound to your area.
Friendly units have arrived in your sector.
Reinforcements have linked up with your position.
WARNING: Anomalous biological signatures detected.
DANGER: Mutant contact confirmed in your vicinity.
A courier is en route to your location.
You need to have your PDA open to make a choice.
$player_name, you've been sticking your nose where it don't belong. The boss is tired of it. A few of my boys are heading your way to have a word. Hope you're ready.
Bring it on. I'll be waiting.
Wait, maybe we can talk. I don't want trouble.
How many? I need to know what I'm facing.
Tell your boss I'm coming for him first.
Brave words. We'll see how brave you are when they find you.
Too late for talk. You should've thought about that earlier.
Enough to make you regret ever crossing us. Maybe five, maybe six.
Big talk for a dead man. They'll find you first.
none
none
none
none
I'll be ready. Send them.
I'll leave the area. Call them off.
I'll set up an ambush. Let them come.
I'm not afraid. I've killed plenty of your kind.
They're already moving. Hope you're ready.
Too late, they've already started. Run if you want.
Ambush? They'll be ready for that. Good luck.
We'll see how many you can take before one gets you.
spawn_hostile:bandit:90
chance:50:spawn_hostile:bandit:120,punish_rep:10
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,reward_gw:5:stalker
spawn_hostile:bandit:90,punish_rep:5
$player_name. Noticed you avoiding us, what are you hiding?.
I didn't see you or you wouldn't be talking right now.
Just checking around for tasks.
Try me.
I'm not looking for trouble, just let me be.
Hah! You'd be dead before you raised your gun.
Tasks? You're just an errand boy? Pathetic.
Try me? I'm right here, come find me.
Too late for that, we're already watching. But maybe if you crawl away, we'll forget.
none
none
none
punish_rep:5
You talk big for someone hiding behind a PDA.
Maybe we can make a deal. I've got money.
I'll find you and make you eat those words.
Fine, I'll leave. This area isn't worth it.
Hiding? I'm right here, waiting. Come find me if you dare.
Money? How much you got? Maybe we can negotiate.
Big talk from a little man. I'll be waiting.
Smart choice. Run while you can.
none
none
none
punish_rep:5
I'm coming for you. Send your coordinates.
How much to make this go away?
You're not worth my time. Forget it.
I'll bring my whole squad. You'll regret this.
I'm at the old warehouse. Come alone if you dare.
5000 RU and we forget you exist.
Running already? Pathetic.
Squad? We've got thirty men. Bring them.
spawn_hostile:bandit:90
chance:50:money:-5000,chance:50:spawn_hostile:bandit:60
punish_rep:5
spawn_hostile:bandit:120
$player_name, I know where there's a hidden stash , military gear, medkits, the works. I'd go myself, but I'm pinned down. Coordinates are attached. Consider it a peace offering.
Sounds too good to be true, but I'll check it out.
Nice try. I'm not falling for an ambush.
Send me the coordinates. If it's a trap, you're dead.
I'll come, but I'm bringing friends.
It's real, I swear. Just be careful.
Your loss. More for us.
Coordinates sent. Hope you survive.
Bring 'em. More loot for us when you're all dead.
none
none
none
none
I'm at the coordinates. Where's the stash?
I don't see anything. You lied.
I found something , but it's guarded.
I'm leaving. This feels wrong.
It's under the big rock. Just look around.
Maybe someone took it already. Too bad.
Yeah, some of the boys might be there. They were supposed to leave.
Probably wise.
chance:70:spawn_hostile:bandit:30,chance:30:reward_stash
none
spawn_hostile:bandit:30
none
$player_name, please, I'm in deep shit. My squad abandoned me, I'm wounded, and I hear mutants nearby. If you send me 2000 RU, I'll tell you where we hid a big stash. I swear on my mother.
req_money:2000
Fine. Here's the money. Talk.
You expect me to trust you? No deal.
I'll give you 1000. That's all you're worth.
Tell me where you are. I'll come help you in person.
Got it. The stash is at the old farmhouse, under the floorboards. Please hurry...
Then I'm dead. Hope you're happy.
1000 helps. I'll still tell you , it's under the floorboards at the farmhouse.
No, stay away! They'll think you're with me. Just send money.
punish_money:2000
none
punish_money:1000
none
I'm at the farmhouse. Nothing here.
Found the stash. It's real. Thanks.
It was a trap! Bandits ambushed me.
I didn't go. Figured you were lying.
Maybe someone beat you to it. Sorry.
Told you. Enjoy the loot.
Heh, they were my backup. Gotcha.
Smart. You live another day.
none
reward_stash
spawn_hostile:bandit:30,punish_rep:10
none
$player_name, there's a controller holed up in the old factory basement. The stalkers are too scared to go in. I thought you might be brave enough , or stupid enough. Coordinates attached. Have fun.
Thanks for the tip. I'll check it out.
I know that area , there's no controller. You're lying.
A controller? I'd need help. Can you spare any men?
I'll go, but if it's a trap, I'll be back for you.
Heh, enjoy.
Worth a shot. Maybe next time.
I'm not wasting my guys on your suicide mission.
You'll be dead, so won't matter.
none
none
none
none
I'm at the basement. It's empty. You lied.
There's no controller, but I found some mutants.
I'm not going. I have better things to do.
If I find you, you're dead.
Maybe it moved. Or maybe I just wanted to waste your time.
Mutants are just as good. Hope you enjoy them.
Smart man.
I'll be waiting.
punish_rep:5
spawn_mutant:random:60
none
none
$player_name, you've been a pain in our side, but you're also effective. The boss wants you gone , peacefully. We'll pay you 5000 RU to stay out of our sector for a while. Deal?
I'll take the money. You have a deal.
No deal. I'll run you out myself.
5000 is too low. Make it 8000.
I'll leave, but I want the money and a stash location.
Smart. Money's wired. Stay away.
Your funeral.
6000 final. Take it or leave it.
Fine. There's a stash at the water tower. Now go.
reward_money:5000,punish_gw:10:bandit
none
reward_money:6000,punish_gw:15:bandit
reward_money:5000,reward_stash,punish_gw:20:bandit
I meant it. Come at me.
Wait, maybe I reconsider. Send the money.
I'll fight, but I'll make you regret it.
I'm already in your sector. Come find me.
They're on the way. Good luck.
Too late. You had your chance.
We'll see.
They're already looking for you.
spawn_hostile:bandit:90
punish_rep:10
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,reward_rep:5
spawn_hostile:bandit:120
$player_name, I'm done with the bandits. They left my brother to die. If you're willing to accept, I'll send a couple of guys who feel the same way , they'll help you out. Just give the word.
I'll take any help I can get. Send them.
I don't trust you. Could be a trap.
Prove it. Send me some information first.
I'll meet them halfway. Where?
They're on their way. They're good people, despite everything.
I understand. I'd feel the same.
Alright , there's a stash at the old mill with some decent gear. That's my proof.
They'll meet you at the railway crossing. Two of them, unarmed as a sign of trust.
none
none
reward_stash
none
I see them , they look friendly.
They never showed. You lied.
One of them pulled a gun! It's a trap.
I changed my mind. Tell them to go back.
Good. They're yours now. Take care of them.
Maybe they got cold feet. Sorry.
I knew it. They were never with me. I'm sorry.
Too late, they're already there. Deal with it.
spawn_companion:stalker:30,reward_gw:30:stalker
none
spawn_hostile:bandit:30,punish_rep:10
spawn_companion:stalker:30,punish_gw:10:stalker
$player_name, I want to bury the hatchet. I'm sending a guy with a medkit and some ammo to your location , a peace offering. Please accept it.
Alright, I'll accept. Send him.
I don't trust you. No deal.
I'll meet him halfway. Where?
Tell him to leave the stuff and go. I'll pick it up.
He's on his way. Be nice.
Suit yourself. The offer was genuine.
He'll wait at the old bus stop. Go alone.
He'll leave it under the rock near your position. Don't follow him.
none
none
none
none
He came, but he pulled a gun!
He dropped the stuff and left. Thanks.
No one showed up.
I killed him. Shouldn't have trusted you.
Heh, gotcha. Hope you survive.
Told you it was genuine. Enjoy.
Maybe he got lost. Sorry.
You'll regret that. We're coming for you.
spawn_hostile:bandit:30,punish_rep:10
courier_item:medkit_army,chance:30:spawn_hostile:bandit:120
none
spawn_hostile:bandit:90,punish_rep:20
$player_name, we know you've been raiding our stashes. Hand over 3000 RU and we'll call it even. Otherwise, we're coming for you.
req_money:3000
Fine. Take the money and leave me alone.
You come for me, you die. Try it.
I'll give you 2000. That's my final offer.
I don't have that much. Let's negotiate.
Wise choice. We'll be watching.
Big words. We'll see.
2500 and we forget it. Deal?
No negotiation. Pay up or die.
punish_money:3000
none
punish_money:2500
none
Come then. I'm ready.
Wait, I'll pay. Don't send them.
I'll pay half now, half later.
I'll fight, and I'll enjoy it.
They're already on the way.
Too late. They've already left.
3000 now, or they come. Choose.
We'll see who enjoys it more.
spawn_hostile:bandit:90
punish_money:3000,punish_rep:10
punish_money:1500,spawn_hostile:bandit:120
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,reward_rep:5

$player_name, you're a dead man walking. We've been firing shots into the air all night , every mutant in the zone is gonna be drawn to the noise. And guess where the noise is coming from? Your sector. Hope you're ready for company.
You idiots , you'll attract them to yourselves too.
I can handle mutants. Bring it on.
How long until they arrive?
I'll leave the area. Good luck with your own mess.
Worth it to see you torn apart.
We'll see.
Any minute now. Hope you're dug in.
Running? Coward. Enjoy the mutants.
none
none
none
none
I hear them coming. Thanks for the warning.
Nothing yet. You were bluffing.
I'm dug in. Let them come.
I'm moving to a safer spot.
Good. Hope they tear you apart.
Maybe they got distracted. Lucky you.
We'll see who's left standing.
Running again? You won't last.
spawn_mutant:random:30
none
spawn_mutant:random:60,reward_rep:10
none
$player_name, I hate you, but I hate the mercs more. They're planning a hit on you tonight. Figured even a dog like you deserves a warning. Don't expect it again.
Why would you warn me?
Thanks, I guess. I'll be ready.
How do you know this?
You're lying to set me up.
Because they're worse than you. Consider it a one-time thing.
Don't thank me. Just stay alive , I want to kill you myself someday.
I got contacts in their camp. They're hiring anyone with a gun.
Believe what you want. Your funeral.
none
none
none
none
I believe you. Thanks for the heads-up.
I'll prepare an ambush for them.
Maybe I'll hit them first.
I still don't trust you. I'm ignoring this.
Don't mention it. Stay alive.
Good idea. Hope you get them.
You'd be doing us a favour. Go for it.
Your choice. I tried.
chance:50:spawn_hostile:killer:120,reward_gw:10:stalker
chance:80:spawn_hostile:killer:90,reward_gw:5:stalker
chance:100:spawn_hostile:killer:60,reward_rep:15
chance:50:spawn_hostile:killer:120,punish_rep:10
$player_name, you and me. One on one. No squad, no surprises. Winner takes all , loser's gear and 5000 RU. Meet at the old iron bridge in an hour. You game?
You're on. I'll be there.
I don't fight for your amusement. Forget it.
I'll come, but I want the money upfront.
I'll bring a squad. See if you're still brave then.
Good. Come alone, or the deal's off.
Chicken. I knew it.
Half now, half after. Deal?
Then it's not one on one. I'm out.
none
punish_rep:10
none
punish_rep:5
I'm at the bridge. Where are you?
You're not here. You chickened out.
I see you. Let's do this.
I brought a friend. He'll watch.
I'm here, waiting behind the pillar. Come on.
I'm here. You blind?
Good. First to draw loses.
That's not the deal. I'm leaving.
spawn_hostile:bandit:30,chance:50:reward_money:5000
none
spawn_hostile:bandit:30,chance:70:reward_money:5000
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,punish_rep:10
$player_name, wait! I know you're after our stash. Don't kill me , I'll tell you where it is. It's at the water tower, buried under the rocks. Just let me go.
Fine. I'll check it out. If you're lying, I'll find you.
I don't believe you. Face me.
Tell me more. What's in it?
I'll let you go, but you owe me.
Thank you! It's real, I swear.
Please, I'm begging you...
Guns, meds, maybe an artifact. I didn't dig deep.
I owe you. I'll remember this.
none
none
none
none
I found the stash. It's real. You're lucky.
Nothing there. You lied.
It was booby-trapped! I almost died.
I didn't go. I don't trust you.
I told you. Enjoy the loot.
Maybe someone took it. Sorry.
I didn't know about traps. Sorry.
Your loss.
reward_stash,reward_gw:10:bandit
none
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,punish_rep:5
none
$player_name, we've got one of your buddies , a loner named $npc_name. If you want him back, wire 10,000 RU to this account. You have one hour, or he's dead.
req_money:10000
I'll pay. Don't hurt him.
I don't have that kind of money. Let him go or else.
I'll pay 5000 now, 5000 later.
Let me talk to him first.
Money received. He'll be released at the depot. Don't follow or we'll kill him.
Too bad. You'll find his body at the depot.
7500 now, 2500 later. Final offer.
He's alive. Says "help". That's all.
punish_money:10000
none
punish_money:7500
none
I'm at the depot. Where is he?
He's not here. You lied.
I found him , he's alive, thanks.
I didn't pay. He's dead, and I'm coming for you.
He should be there. Check behind the shed.
Maybe he ran. Not our problem.
Told you. Now stay away.
We'll be waiting.
reward_rep:30
punish_rep:20,chance:50:spawn_hostile:bandit:90
reward_rep:50,reward_gw:20:stalker
spawn_hostile:bandit:60,punish_rep:30
$player_name, you think you've won, but I've been firing my rifle toward your position for the last ten minutes. Every bloodsucker in the area is gonna be on your trail. Good luck, stalker.
You're bluffing.
I'm ready for anything.
I'm moving to a new position.
I'll hunt you down after.
Am I? Listen...
We'll see.
They'll follow the sound. You can't escape.
If you survive the mutants, maybe.
none
none
none
none
I hear something. Maybe you were right.
Nothing yet. You're full of it.
I'm dug in. Let them come.
I'm leaving the area. Good luck with your own bloodsuckers.
Told you. Hope they get you.
Maybe they got lost. Lucky.
We'll see who wins.
Running again? You're a coward.
spawn_mutant:bloodsucker:30
none
spawn_mutant:bloodsucker:60,reward_rep:10
none
